description: Pluggable idea-validation slot for scoring sourced ideas with web-backed market and timing research.

fields.name: promptSource
fields.description: Relative path to the Markdown prompt source that drives this validation mode.

fields.name: ideaSource
fields.description: Reference to the source agent, slot, and config that produce the candidate ideas.

fields.name: researchMode
fields.description: How aggressively the validator should browse and validate market evidence.

fields.name: outputMode
fields.description: The expected output shape, such as scored ranking, kill/keep memo, or validation brief.

fields.name: sourceTypes
fields.description: Preferred source categories for validating competition, demand, and technical timing.

fields.name: researchDimensions
fields.description: The evidence dimensions the validator should explicitly research.

fields.name: scoringAxes
fields.description: Criteria used to score each idea.

fields.name: scoreScale
fields.description: Human-readable score scale, such as 0-10 or low/medium/high.
